positive_comment: Nice, clean, well equipped, good wellness, nice bar and food.

negative_comment: I would strongly recommend reconsidering the wellness area: the pool has very cold water, and especially during the winter it is not comfortable. title: If you want to get away from it all, this is the place
positive_comment: Great hotel in small village. Typical Austrian Hospitality
negative_comment: Bartender was grumpy

title: Great experience with a few minor drawbacks
positive_comment:
We had a great stay at this hotel! The entire place was extremely clean, and the staff was not only very nice but also incredibly helpful, making our experience even better. The hotel is well-equipped, providing everything we needed.

The breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of options to suit different tastes.
negative_comment:
One downside was that the room we received was different from what was shown in the pictures, which was a bit disappointing.

The dinner could have been better. Almost every dish contained paprika and onion, which might not be to everyone’s liking. While we fully support minimizing food waste, it felt like the dinner menu was designed based on leftover ingredients from breakfast rather than a well-thought-out selection.

positive_comment: A great team working to make sure everyone was looked after

title: Generally it was good. Nice foods, wellness, drinks. I would give 4 out of 5 stars because of the parking experience, bu
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, one of our best stays in austria! Delicious foods in the restaurant, clean rooms, nice wellness facility.
negative_comment:
Out of all the goods there were only two things we did not like:
- Food varieties
- Parking

The food was super delicious but the breakfast was essentially always the same, and I would have loved if I saw some fantasy in the dinner.

The parking was ok, but it is not convenient/comfortable at all. Asking 6 euros/day for this parking experience is not fair. The hotel is fully booked and the best case if there is one parking spot for each room.. If you arrive late your only options will be the 2 parking spots right next to the walls, left from the entrance. These spots are so tight that I cant even open the door on either sides.

title: Perfect ski getaway 🎿
positive_comment: Everything was perfect - from the location, staff, rooms, food.. everything! Will be back 🙌🎿
Very nice hotel with lovely wellness area, climbing wall, cozy lobby bar and dog friendly rooms. Breakfast and dinner were good with gluten free options.
negative_comment: A tea/coffee maker would be a nice to have in the rooms.

negative_comment: Calculate 30min for a complicated automated checkin

title: Clean,comforable, modern good sized room. Close proximity to motorway, fuel station and town
positive_comment: Location for the motorway. Location for petrol station over the road for fuel and food. Room was modern, very clean with a decent sized shower/toilet room. Shower gell and shampoo provided. Overall feel of the hotel was very and exceede our expectations.
negative_comment: The rear of the hotel for parking was initially rather off putting as it was basically ramshackle business premises, some large trucks etc, which gave a very poor feel to the place. We parked there and no problems incurred. No restaurant although a room and microwave provided for personal use. We used the local restaurant a few minutes drive down the road.

positive_comment: Excellent value for money, new, well maintained and clean

negative_comment: Maybe on booking.com it would be better to write that you have an excellent check-in system throughout the day and night. This helps in selecting latecomers. For me this was invaluable.

title: Easy acces, clean and modern
positive_comment: The eMotel is really easily accesible from the main road and the motorway and there is a lot of free parking spaces in front of the building. The quality of service and price ratio is okay.

positive_comment: Sehr gutes und reichhaltiges Frühstückbuffet, angenehmer SPA-Bereich, sehr gutes Abendbuffet, freundliche Bedienung.

negative_comment: Saunaöffnungszeiten

positive_comment: Das Personal im Speisesaal, sowie der Bar war sehr sehr freundlich.

Das gesamte Hotel ist in einem überaus gepflegten Zustand. Der Umstand, dass es sich um ein ehemaliges Krankenhaus handelt kommt positiv zum Tragen, da es hier keine engen Hotelflure gibt, sondern alles schön weit und luftig ist. Das Personal war durchweg freundlich und hilfsbereit, das Angebot über die Feiertage, insbesondere für Kinder, vielfältig.

title: Schön,
positive_comment: Angenehmer Gym und Spa-Bereich, sehr sauber, gut eingerichtet, groß und hell.
negative_comment: Das Abendessen war leider nicht besonders gut.

title: mit meiner Familie gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Hier wird Gastfreundschaft groß geschrieben und man fühlt sich ab Minute 1 wirklich wohl. Das Essen war sehr gut, die Bar lässt keine Wünsche offen und auch sonst ist das Hotel in einem sehr gepflegten Zustand.
negative_comment: Wassertemperatur im Schwimmbad zu niedrig; es sollten im Schwimmbad auch mehr Liegen aufgestellt werden (hier wird es nachmittags sehr eng!).

title: Sehr schöner Kurzurlaub in herrlicher Umgebung mit Wellnessunterlegung, sehr schönes Wandergebiet,

negative_comment: Alles 👍

title: Leider nur eine Nacht auf der Durchreise
positive_comment:
Der online Check-in funktionierte reibungslos. Der Check-in Automat am Eingangsbereich war mehrsprachig und einfach zu bedienen. 
Die Zimmer waren sehr sauer und einladend. 

Im Eingangsbereich gab es Automaten mit Sandwiches, Getränken und Snacks. 

Lage sehr gut mit Einkaufsmöglichkeiten, Restaurants und Nahe der Autobahn.

 Gerne wieder. Sehr zu empfehlen!

title: Perfekte Unterkunft für Zwischenübernachtung
positive_comment:
Super Anbindung. Zimmer sind ausserordentlich sauber und hat unsere Erwartung übertroffen.
Perfekt für eine Zwischenübernachtung. Einfacher Self-Checkin (noch einfacher, wenn man sich vorher registriert).
Gut durchdachtes Hotelkonzept.
Alles in der Nähe, was man braucht. 
Tipp fürs Frühstück: Taverne, die sich nicht weit vom Hotel befindet. Super nette Bedienung und sehr leckeres Frühstück.

title: Ziemlich perfekt für Durchreise mit Auto. Ladestation direkt beim Hotel.
positive_comment: Super praktisch. Alles automatisiert. Schöner Kaffeeraum für morgens. Super gelegen (kurz nach Autobahnabfahrt Trieben), also perfekt für Durchreisende. Bonus für Elektrofahrzeuge: Teslay Supercharger sowie via ENBW direkt beim Hotel !!

title: Immer wieder gerne
positive_comment: Gute Lage, sauber und für eine Nacht unkompliziert und gut
negative_comment: Scanner des Automaten, funktionierte nicht

title: Bin sehr zufrieden,komme wieder!
positive_comment: Super Lage,sehr sauber und bequem.Ideal für Durchreise.

Das Hotel hat eine gute Verkehrsanbindung zum Zentrum 
Sehr gutes Frühstück und freundliches ,hilfsbereiten Personal
Sehr sauber, war auch jemand vor Ort falls man Hilfe brauchte, Self Check in hat super funktioniert, Ausstattung modern und zweckmäßig, Automaten vor Ort mit Getränken und Snacks

title: Praktische, saubere Unterkunft
positive_comment: Perfekte Lage für eine Übernachtung auf der Durchreise, große Zimmer und großes Bad, alles super sauber. Problemloser Selfcheckin
negative_comment: Nichts

title: Struttura pulita e accogliente.
positive_comment:
Della struttura ho apprezzato soprattutto la pulizia, sia della camera che delle aree comuni. Molto comodo anche il parcheggio nel garage sotterraneo. Il personale è sempre stato disponibile ed educato: qualunque richiesta è stata accolta senza problemi. Abbiamo trovato molto buono anche il cibo del ristorante. La struttura è assolutamente adatta alle famiglie con bambini. La stanza dedicata ai più piccoli è davvero bella, con una parete di arrampicata che mia figlia ha adorato.
La struttura dispone di tutto l’occorrente per rilassarsi e tenersi in forma: palestra, piscina e una bella area spa.
negative_comment: Per quanto riguarda gli aspetti meno positivi, la piscina è risultata piuttosto piccola e le sdraio disponibili non erano sufficienti rispetto al numero di ospiti. Durante il nostro soggiorno, l’acqua delle piscine era fredda, rendendo difficile il bagno, soprattutto per i bambini più piccoli. Inoltre, il personale della reception non parlava italiano, il che in alcune situazioni ha reso la comunicazione più complicata. Infine, la struttura non offre animazione né per i bambini né per gli adulti.

positive_comment: Molto bello per i bambini, dal personale, alla cena alla piscina

title: Rilassante
positive_comment: Struttura molto bella con sala fitness piscina e centro benessere, e spazi esterni per rilassarsi. Comodo parcheggio sotterraneo
negative_comment: C’ero già stato nel 2017 e all’epoca il ristorante era all’altezza dell’hotel. Adesso no, poca scelta e la cucina chiude prestissimo la sera. Solo la colazione resta ottima

title: Posto dove rilassarsi e rigenerarsi!
positive_comment:
Albergo situato nel centro di St. Lambrecht.
Struttura con molti servizi per le famiglie, stanza giochi, parete arrampicata, tavolo da ping pong e servizio baby sitter. Piscina bellissima e zona Spa curata e molto pulita.
Colazione continentale abbondante a buffet e cena con ampia scelta.
Stanza familiare ampia con letto matrimoniale e divano letto per i ragazzi.
Molto apprezzato e comodo il book disponibile in reception con le escursioni e posti da visitare nelle vicinanze o nel raggio di 30 km dalla struttura.
negative_comment: Proporrei di avere il menù anche in lingua inglese, non solo in tedesco.

We had a great stay at this hotel! The entire place was extremely clean, and the staff was not only very nice but also incredibly helpful, making our experience even better. The hotel is well-equipped, providing everything we needed.

The breakfast was excellent, with a wide variety of options to suit different tastes.
negative_comment:
One downside was that the room we received was different from what was shown in the pictures, which was a bit disappointing.

The dinner could have been better. Almost every dish contained paprika and onion, which might not be to everyone’s liking. While we fully support minimizing food waste, it felt like the dinner menu was designed based on leftover ingredients from breakfast rather than a well-thought-out selection.

positive_comment: A great team working to make sure everyone was looked after

title: Generally it was good. Nice foods, wellness, drinks. I would give 4 out of 5 stars because of the parking experience, bu
positive_comment: Beautiful hotel, one of our best stays in austria! Delicious foods in the restaurant, clean rooms, nice wellness facility.
negative_comment:
Out of all the goods there were only two things we did not like:
- Food varieties
- Parking

The food was super delicious but the breakfast was essentially always the same, and I would have loved if I saw some fantasy in the dinner.

The parking was ok, but it is not convenient/comfortable at all. Asking 6 euros/day for this parking experience is not fair. The hotel is fully booked and the best case if there is one parking spot for each room.. If you arrive late your only options will be the 2 parking spots right next to the walls, left from the entrance. These spots are so tight that I cant even open the door on either sides.

title: Perfect ski getaway 🎿
positive_comment: Everything was perfect - from the location, staff, rooms, food.. everything! Will be back 🙌🎿
Excellent value for money, new, well maintained and clean
I think it's great because I was able to check in myself after 10:00 PM and get a room card. It's not a problem at all to come to the room during the night. Nice rooms and drink&food
negative_comment: Maybe on booking.com it would be better to write that you have an excellent check-in system throughout the day and night. This helps in selecting latecomers. For me this was invaluable.

title: Cheap and cheerful
positive_comment:
Decent accommodation for cheap.Free parking available around the property. Mind it's in a very quiet location.It's very close to most major roads , a Shell petrol station and  a food van within 
50 yards that's open til late (22:00 I'm not sure)
negative_comment: Self check in procedure could be challenging for some

title: Brilliant Thankyou!
positive_comment: Brilliant location right off the motorway, lovely size room & bathroom. Beautiful views in the morning and for us we found self check in/out very efficient.
negative_comment: No lock on the inside of the bedroom door, which can be a problem if traveling with small children as was worried my toddler would let himself out!

title: Easy acces, clean and modern
positive_comment: The eMotel is really easily accesible from the main road and the motorway and there is a lot of free parking spaces in front of the building. Check in is very practical as well - self check in via an ekiosk in the lobby right next to the entrance door. The room was spacious, very clean and modern. The quality of service and price ratio is okay.

Convenient location, modern and clean lobby and room, not noisy despite the close proximity of the highway, and I also found the self-check in convenient (even though it did not accept our documents so a lot of data had to be entered manually).
negative_comment: The only thing I did not like was that while we had a good wifi connection when we arrived in the middle of the night, the wifi did not work at all in the morning.

positive_comment: We stayed for a night while crossing through Germany. The location was extra convenient for us as the motorway was a minute away. The check-in, room, and environment were extremely great and easy. We will most likely visit again the next time we drive through Germany.

title: Perfection
positive_comment: It is perfection in every detail. Next to the high way, spacious parking, fast self check in, very nice lobby, very very nice rooms and beds, super nice bathroom...
negative_comment: No complaint at all

title: transit hotel with an automated checkin of 30 min
positive_comment: The place is quite new and good for transit, safe parking in the back, village nearby has great breakfasts
negative_comment: Calculate 30min for a complicated automated checkin

title: Clean,comforable, modern good sized room. Close proximity to motorway, fuel station and town
positive_comment: Location for the motorway. Location for petrol station over the road for fuel and food. Room was modern, very clean with a decent sized shower/toilet room. Shower gell and shampoo provided. Overall feel of the hotel was very and exceede our expectations.
negative_comment: The rear of the hotel for parking was initially rather off putting as it was basically ramshackle business premises, some large trucks etc, which gave a very poor feel to the place. We parked there and no problems incurred. No restaurant although a room and microwave provided for personal use. We used the local restaurant a few minutes drive down the road.

positive_comment: Excellent value for money, new, well maintained and clean
I think it's great because I was able to check in myself after 10:00 PM and get a room card. It's not a problem at all to come to the room during the night. Nice rooms and drink&food
negative_comment: Maybe on booking.com it would be better to write that you have an excellent check-in system throughout the day and night. This helps in selecting latecomers. For me this was invaluable.

title: Perfection

negative_comment: No complaint at all

positive_comment: Nice, clean, well equipped, good wellness, nice bar and food.
The hotel is nice and close to ski resorts. The breakfast and the dinner was satisfying, the staff was also kind.
negative_comment: I would strongly recommend reconsidering the wellness area: the pool has very cold water, and especially during the winter it is not comfortable. In addition, I would recommend changing the sauna concept (now it is adults only). The food was fine, but wider assortment would be better.

title: We are very satisfied with the hotel.
positive_comment:
The staff was very freindly and helpful, especially in the restaurant. They tried to do their best to fulfill your requests.
Foods are tasty. There are plenty of facilities and services: parking place, gym, swimming pool, saunna, washing room, ski stuff storage, etc.

title: Nice, peaceful hotel at a great location
positive_comment: Great location, spacious rooms, nice breakfast, nice staff.
negative_comment:
Dinner could have been better, but it was still OK.
I was missing a jacuzzi.
The pool was quite cold, but warm enough for swimming.

title: If you want to get away from it all, this is the place
positive_comment: Great hotel in small village. Typical Austrian Hospitality
negative_comment: Bartender was grumpy

title: Perfect ski getaway 🎿
positive_comment: Everything was perfect - from the location, staff, rooms, food.. everything! Will be back 🙌🎿
Very nice hotel with lovely wellness area, climbing wall, cozy lobby bar and dog friendly rooms. Breakfast and dinner were good with gluten free options.
negative_comment: A tea/coffee maker would be a nice to have in the rooms.

title: I really liked Graz. a very nice city.
positive_comment: A lovely unspoilt hotel with a very friendly lady on reception. Lovely city and hotel is close to the River Mur where a series of bridges link to the old city and park.
negative_comment: Sadly, on the morning of my departure I had a problem with the fixture which converts from bath to shower waterflow. I had just take part in the local Graz parkrun so a shower would have been nice instead of climbing in and out of a bath with aching limbs. These things happen

positive_comment: The staff was absolutely wonderful and my only regret was that I didn't get to know their names so I could thank them personally.
negative_comment: The showers could use a renovation - bigger showers with new tile grout and silicone caulk, but everything else was great.

title: We loved our stay at the charming Hotel Mariahilf. The staff really enhanced our stay in Graz by how friendly and helpfu
positive_comment: The hotel Mariahilf exceeded our expectations. The staff were delightful. So professional and so friendly. The location was perfect. The rooms were very clean and tidy and the breakfast was delicious
negative_comment: The floors were a little bit creaky but we were happy to look past that as the building was built in the 1600’s!

positive_comment: Great hotel on great location. Very nice, quiet and clean rooms. Great breakfast. Staff is perfect! Great value for money. For sure I will back at this hotel again.

title: Good stay in Graz
positive_comment: Very good location, almost in the centre of the Graz. Close to the main attractions as Main Square or Castle.
negative_comment: Nothing particular. In room was no kettel and fridge, but it is not necessary. Maybe the wardrobe in my room was old, but I saw in others that was the new one for example.

title: Acceptable
positive_comment: Amazing location, good breakfast and friendly staff.
negative_comment: Everything was very basic. The room feels like a room from a university dormitory.

title: A fine bit old fashioned cozy hotel close to the city center and the remarkable museum of contemporary art.
positive_comment: Well located. Friendly reception. Clean an confortable
negative_comment: No real remarks

positive_comment: I Have frequently stayed at this hotel, very clean, good breakfast friendly staff great location.
negative_comment: Can be a little noisy at night depending on the room but does not stop us choosing this hotel.

positive_comment: El servicio por parte Victor fue excepcional, tiene una gran ubicación y múltiples opciones para comer, además que prácticamente todo el recorrido se puede hacer a pie, si te gusta caminar.
negative_comment: Que no hubiese agua embotellada en las habitaciones, ni una mini-nevera

title: Cozy place to stay near the city center
positive_comment:
The hotel is situated in the buzzing city center of Graz, close to public transportation, sights and a lovely farmer's market. The staff of the hotel were very welcoming from the first second, helping us getting around town and being very accomodating with any request that we had in our mind. There was even a welcome drink included with our stay, which we could get from the hotel's own bar. Breakfast was nice and plenty and was served in the hotel's own breakfast lounge.

There are several great restaurants nearby, and all the sights of Graz are in a walking distance. The hotel does not have its own private car park, however there is an underground parking where hotel guests can park with a discount and it is literally a minute away from the hotel in a convenient location.
negative_comment: The only thing that we would change was the bed. For us it was too soft, were not providing enough support for our backs, but that is a minor thing and is based on our own personal preference.

positive_comment: The location was fantastic and the breakfast was very good. The staff were welcoming and I would stay again.
negative_comment: Nothing.

positive_comment: Super friendly staff, nice rooms, sauna, pool and good food.

Sauna and pool were lovely.
Nice area to sit in front of the fire in reception.
negative_comment: Rooms a little basic but they were clean and comfortable. Small balcony with a view.

title: Lovely place with nice people around
positive_comment: Lovely Locality, very nice staff, I mean all of them, from reception through waitress to chambermaids.. Even the TÜV guy who I saw there w was nice.. The food was really great and there is no way anyone would be hungry after those portions..
negative_comment: That we have to leave 🫢

positive_comment: Super friendly staff, very clean and spacious room, excellent food in hotel restaurant (breakfast and dinner) with various vegan choices, beautiful and peaceful area around hotel, dogs are welcome. Hope to visit again soon!

title: You get everything you wish for
positive_comment: You get everything: beautiful landscape, swimming pool, excellent quality of food, playground, tennis, table tennis, hiking, biking. Cosy, relaxing, cannot wish for more. Absolutely great value for money.
negative_comment: Nothing to complain about.

positive_comment: Nice clean hotel in amazing country side. Very comfortable bed.
negative_comment: wifi was a little unstable

title: A short stay during our vacation trip. One night in a marvellous hideout surrounded by mountains. Great views, clean air
positive_comment: Very clean, helpful staff, nice pool. Great breakfast!
The Wellness Area was very cosy, you don't hear any traffic and the food was great as well.
negative_comment: The Indoor Pool was to cold for kids what made it a little bit different to play in the water properly. But we enjoyed our stay and will come back!

title: Great
positive_comment:
Comfy bed, big room, good shower
Great wee swimming pool, mostly no one else in it ( hotel runs a lot of seminars and events so most people otherwise engaged). Lovely buffet breakfast and evening salad buffet or a la carts ( recommend local trout!)Fab indoor Padel Park next door. Nice walk into Semriach village.
negative_comment: Nothing

title: Friendly staff and great value for money hotel with skiing possibilities about 50km away
positive_comment: lovely and friendly staff who went out of their way to make our stay pleasant
Ubicación muy buena, prácticamente en el centro, con un ambiente divertido. Desayuno muy correcto y personal muy amable y agradable.

title: Muy recomendable
positive_comment: Me gustó mucho, es un hotel clásico, con decoración de buena calidad, habitación bien  amplia y cómoda. El desayuno excelente, surtido y con productos de buena calidad, el personal fue  amable. La ubicación cerca del centro y con buen transporte público  a la estación. Tiene un bar animado, con mesitas en el exterior donde se puede salir a fumar.
negative_comment:
Yo hice las observaciones en recepción:
1.- la entrada al baño tiene un peldaño de app 2 cm por lo que casi me cai. Especialmente si uno va un poco dormida en la noche.
2.- tiene persianas antiguas que no impiden la entrada de luz exterior; hay edificios al frente que tienen luz muy potente cuya claridad impide dormir.   Si no ponen celosías eléctricas, por lo menos sugiero cortinas black-out.

positive_comment: Ubicado en pleno centro para realizar turismo sin necesidad de usar transportes. Parking al lado del hotel. Zonas para cenar y tomar algo a pocos metros. Camas cómodas. Todo limpio. Desayuno variado y rico.
negative_comment: Hacia calor en las habitaciones y no había aire acondicionado ni ventilador.

title: Fantástica relación calidad-precio
positive_comment:
Muy buena ubicación
Cómoda la cama y las almohadas
Buena insonorización
Desayuno correcto
negative_comment:
La llave de la habitación era tamaño XL. Curioso que no sea tipo tarjeta
Todo correcto en general. La ducha podría ser un poco más ergonómica.

title: Brillante y acogedora.
positive_comment: El desayuno espectacular. Pero fundamentalmente el lugar donde se desayuna. Un 5 estrellas.
negative_comment: No se...realmente no encuentro ningún motivo.

title: Cumpleaños en Graz
positive_comment: Amplia habitación con vistas al Uhrturm, gran desayuno y super céntrico. Pegado a todo!
negative_comment: El baño estaba un poco viejo.

positive_comment: La ausencia de Aire acondicionado puede ser un problema
negative_comment: La falta de aire

title: Hotel muy cómodo
positive_comment: Está en el centro de la ciudad, por lo que es muy cómodo para moverte andando. Además el parking está justo al lado y te hacen un "descuento" y pagas   20€ al día. La habitación muy amplia y la cama muy cómoda.
negative_comment: Del desayuno esperábamos algo más, es normal.

positive_comment: Todo perfecto, desde la atención hasta la comodidad!

El lugar, la vista desde la habitación
Cómoda y el desayuno muy variado y rico.
negative_comment: La cena, salvo la ensalada, decepcionante.

negative_comment: Nothing

title: Gute Lage, super Frühstück
positive_comment:
Die Lage ist absolut perfekt für einen Kurztrip nach Graz. Alles ist zu Fuss gut erreichbar z.B. Innenstadt und Schlossberg.
Das Frühstück ist sehr gut und das gesamte Personal war ausgesprochen freundlich und hilfsbereit.
negative_comment: Die nicht so gute Bewertung beim Komfort liegt daran, dass die Zimmer leider keine Klimaanlage haben, daher ist es, wenn es draußen warm ist, auch im Zimmer und v.a. im Bad doch sehr warm. Und da das Hotel in einer Fussgängerzone mit vielen Lokalen liegt, ist es bei offenem Fenster auch ein wenig laut.

positive_comment:
Die Lage direkt in der Altstadt , mit Blick auf den Uhrenturm ,die Kunsthalle und die kurzen Wege zum Bahnhof und Tram , machten uns die Besichtigungen sehr leicht.Die Touristeninfo ist auch sehr gut ausgestattet und so waren Wanderungen durch die Klam und an dem wunderschönen Fluss entlang auch problemlos, obwohl wir mit der DB angereist sind.
Das Hotel ist schon sehr alt und so sollte man nicht mit neuen Leitungen im Bad rechnen.
negative_comment: Siehe oben Bad, aber das ist nebensächlich. Ich habe die Badewanne sehr genossen und wusste,dass es kein Neubau ist.

positive_comment: Die Lage ist top! Personal sehr freundlich. Frühstück war ganz gut :-)
negative_comment: Der Lärmpegel von draußen war ein Wahnsinn! Hat unsere Nachtruhe leider sehr beeinträchtigt.

title: Tolle Lage für einen kurzen City Trip
positive_comment: Sehr Zentrumsnahe, gute Parkmöglichkeit, gutes Frühstück

Sehr freundliches Personal. Reichhaltiges gutes Frühstück. Super Lage. Zimmer sehr sauber. Preisgünstig.
Es befindet sich eine super tolle Bar im Haus wo wir auch freundlichst bedient wurden.
negative_comment: Dusche veraltet.

positive_comment: Wir waren schon mehrmals im Hotel Mariahilf und kommen gerne wieder!

title: Tolles Hotel
positive_comment:
Mir hat besonders das freundliche und aufmerksame Personal gefallen. Auch das Frühstücksbuffet war ansprechend, abwechslungsreich in einem Raum mit angenehmer Atmosphäre und sehr gutem Service 

Die Lage und damit auch Anbindung an den ÖPNV und die Sehenswürdigkeiten ist sehr gut.
negative_comment:
Ich war in einem Dachgeschosszimmer untergebracht.. Das Zimmer an sich war gut, aber die eingebaute Duschkabine war extrem klein/eng (gefühlte 50 bis 60 cm Schenkellänge).

Wofür das Hotel nichts kann, ist der nächtliche Lärm, eventuell nur am Wochenende (ging bis ca 4 Uhr früh) durch "Partyszene"
Bei geöffnetem Fenster war Schlafen daher absolut unmöglich.. Bei  geschlossenem Fenster kam es zu "Hitzestau" im Zimmer, was Schlafen auch verunmöglichte bzw. nur unter starker (körperlicher) Belastung ging.. Nun war es mit ca 5 Grad Celsius Außentemperatur noch kühl. Im Sommer halte ich diese Zimmer im Dachgeschoss, da keine Klimaanlage vorhanden, für nicht funktionsgerecht. Da würde ich nach Zimmern in den beiden  unteren Etagen und eventuell nach Zimmern Richtung Innenhof, falls es diese gibt, fragen. Der Lärm war extrem auf beiden Straßen (Kosaken und Mariahilfstr.). Mir tut das für das Hotel schrecklich leid, dass dessen Eindruck unter der Einwirkung lärmender Menschen in der Nacht leidet. Das hat das Hotel nicht verdient..

title: Kurz Besuch in der Stadt
positive_comment: Wir sind gerne in dem Hotel weil das Preis Leistung Verhältnis sehr gut ist, und weil es mitten in der Stadt im Zentrum liegt.
negative_comment: Ein älteres Stadt Hotel,.. Preis Leistung super,.. Lage mitten im Zentrum

title: Ich werde wieder hier buchen, weil ich die Gegend und das Flair des Hotels liebe.
positive_comment: Der Empfang war überaus freundlich. Die Lage ist  zentral und in einer schönen Gegend. Das Zimmer war kuschelig warm, das Badezimmer sehr sauber. Der Frühstücksraum ist gemütlich, das Frühstück völlig ausreichend im Angebot. Die dazugehörende bar 8020 ist empfehlenswert!
negative_comment: Unser Zimmer lag leider über einem Pub,  vor der es lange immer wieder sehr laut war.

title: top Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis in toller Lage
positive_comment: nettes, hilfsbereites Personal, super Lage mit Blick auf das "Friendly Alien" aka Kunsthaus Graz; Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis top; Hotelbar auch empfehlenswert
negative_comment: Zimmer sind etwas in die Jahre gekommen und könnten make-over vertragen

title: Wir haben uns in der herrlichen Umgebung und der Wohlfühlatmosphäre im Hotel super entspannen und e.
positive_comment:
Das Hotel liegt inmitten der Natur. Man hat einen tollen Ausblick, viel Ruhe und einen großen Außenbereich sowohl für Kinder als auch für Erwachsene mit vielen Sitzgelegenheiten zum Entspannen und Wohlfühlen. 
Das Hotel ist überaus sauber und gepflegt, das Personal sehr freundlich und zuvorkommend.
negative_comment: Es hat uns an nichts gefehlt.

positive_comment: Das Personal war sehr freundlich und ich habe die Zeit wirklich genossen.
Sehr gut! Sehr freundliches Personal, alles sauber und sehr bequem. Tolle Umgebung und der Wellness Bereich war echt toll zum relaxen 👌

title: Wohlfühlen bei guter Luft und sehr gutem Essen; ein tolles Haus - gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Die Lage ist einfach super! Das Essen ist von hervorragender Qualität, die Portionen sind halt manchmal so groß, dass man nicht immer alles schafft, doch ich habe dann auf kleine Portionen problemlos umgeswitchet. Das Zimmer war angenehm ruhig (lag auch daran, dass keine unmittelbaren Nachbarn), die Luft sowieso einfach nur super - komme gerne wieder für ein Wochenende zum Abspannen!!
negative_comment: Nicht so kuschelig war die Temperatur im Ruheraum, da viel gelüftet wird - da ging es im Jänner halt nur mit Socken und Sweater. Dh der Raum könnte wärmer sein, wurde aber mit einer Kollegin vor Ort besprochen. Weiters ist in der Dampfsauna wenig Dampf und der Saunabereich für alle zugänglich, dh nicht separiert oder nur für adults. Es gibt auch nur Mini-Becher im Badezimmer, doch man findet damit durchaus das Auslangen. Empfehlenswert wären eventuell Gläser direkt am Zimmer.

title: Sehr schönes Hotel
positive_comment: Sehr schönes komfortables Hotel. Gutes Frühstück. Personal freundlich und sehr zuvorkommend,  obwohl Hotel ab nächsten Tag in Betriebsurlaub gegangen ist.
Das Personal ist außerordentlich freundlich und hilfsbereit. Die Zimmer waren sehr sauber. Das Frühstücksbuffet war vielfältig und das Abend- bzw Mittagmenü wirklich sehr gut.

title: Angenehmer Aufenthalt in einem gepflegten Haus
positive_comment: Sehr schöne Lage im "Grünen" - ruhige Umgebung. Alles sehr sauber. Teilweise sind die Zimmer noch nicht erneuert aber das stört nicht wirklich weil alles in sehr gutem Zustand ist. Das Frühstück ist sehr gut mit großer Auswahl. Das Abendessen (aus der Karte) ebenfalls sehr gut - große Portionen.
negative_comment: Beim Frühstück ist durch große Gruppen im Hotel eine ziemliche Unruhe am Buffet und es ist schwer immer alles verfügbar zu haben - aber es wird trotzdem versucht fehlendes Angebot rasch nachzuliefern.

title: TOP - tolles Service & Verpflegung, ruhige schöne Lage - erholsamer Kurzurlaub zum Wiederholen
positive_comment:
Gutes Frühstück und ganz tolles Abendmenü - Pool ist klein aber passt sehr gut um Längen zu schwimmen, Saunabereich angenehm - Lage etwas abseits vom Ort sehr ruhig - Zimmertemperatur gut steuerbar bei Minusgraden draussen
Personal an Rezeption und Restaurant sehr freundlich, vielen Dank ganz besonders an Flavio vom Restaurantservice !
negative_comment: nichts

title: angenehmer Aufenthalt in ruhiger Lage
positive_comment:
Schöne Lage, genügend Parkplätze, Restaurant im Haus, gutes Frühstück.
Zimmer geräumig und modern eingerichtet.

Für den Preis darf man sich kein Zimmer im 4* Bereich erwarten. Mein Einbettzimmer war klein, dunkel und spärlich eingerichtet (hat mich ans Internat erinnert), aber mit neuem Bad und sehr sauber. Das meiner Freundin war größer und heller, aber sehr veraltet. 
Essen war fabelhaft, Personal freundlich, alles sauber 👍
Die Lage sehr ruhig, was für uns perfekt war.
Fazit: Preis / Leistung passt
negative_comment: Einige Zimmer sollten wohl noch erneuert werden 😉

positive_comment: Camera grande, letto molto comodo, posizione ottima, colazione anche.

title: Ottimo
positive_comment: L'albergo si trova in posizione centralissima, a due passi da un parcheggio interrato in pieno centro città. Menzione speciale per lo Staff, che si è adoperato al meglio per risolvere un problema di domenica alla mia auto. Servizio che da solo vale punteggio pieno. Assolutamente consigliato.

Bagno forse da rimodernare un po’ ma pulito e molto grande!
Colazione ottima e abbondante!
In reception poi, abbiamo trovato Paul: accogliente, simpatico, paziente, professionale… persona speciale che ci ha saputo indirizzare in ogni cosa!

Posizione centrale
Camera spaziosa
Buffet molto fornito e curato

title: Molto soddisfacente. É la seconda volta che ci fermiamo e probabilmente non sarà neanche l’ultima

Il fascino del luogo con arredi d’epoca
La posizione centrale

La colazione ricca
Il bar della struttura
Le gentilezza del personale
Il rapporto qualità prezzo favorevole

title: Un luogo di relax e silenzio
positive_comment: La struttura è immersa nel verde e isolata, garantisce pace e silenzio. La colazione continentale era abbondante e varia. Lo staff molto disponibile e cordiale. Piscina e spa compresi nel prezzo della camera sono stati di nostro gradimento. Comodo il ristorante interno aperto a pranzo e a cena e il bar che offre conforto nelle giornate piovose, come sono state quelle del nostro soggiorno.
negative_comment: La nostra camera era un po' vecchiotta, ma il bagno era stato ristrutturato.

title: Très bel hôtel au cœur de la magnifique ville de Graz
positive_comment:
Nous avons tout aimé à commencer par l’emplacement de l’hôtel que nous n’imaginions pas si central ! La visite du centre de Graz commence dès que l’on sort de l’hôtel et tout se fait facilement à pied. Pour autant nous n’avons pas été importunés par le bruit de la rue. Les chambres sont spacieuses et les lits confortables. Le verre offert à l’arrivée est un petit plus que nous avons beaucoup apprécié. 
Le parking proposé à proximité de l’hôtel était un peu cher à notre goût et nous lui avons préféré un parking relais gratuit accessible en transport en commun (P+R Weinzödl).

La chambre était grande. L'emplacement parfait pour visiter Graz. Il n'y a eu aucun problème pour parquer la voiture dans le garage souterrain et l'hôtel avait un local pour mettre le vélo en sécurité. Le petit déjeuner était dans une jolie salle, il était copieux.
negative_comment: La chambre donnait sur une ruelle avec des bars, l'ambiance était sympa mais le bruit a duré  longtemps, impossible de dormir avec la fenêtre ouverte.

title: Hôtel confortable, petit déjeuner turque copieux, l'hôtel est proche à pied des sites d'intérêt.
positive_comment: Hôtel proche des centres d'intérêt historique.

Bel hôtel dans une rue calme du centre ville qui permet de se promener et d'apprécier la ville. Les chambres sont spacieuses avec un lit très confortable. Le petit déjeuner est très bon et très varié avec du choix dans le pain croustillant et les gateaux sont délicieux.

title: comme d'habitude, tres bien.
positive_comment: Tres bon emplacement ainsi que tres bon petit dejeuner et chambre tres propre.

title: Belle découverte d'une ville magnifique.

title: I really liked Graz. a very nice city.
positive_comment: A lovely unspoilt hotel with a very friendly lady on reception. Lovely city and hotel is close to the River Mur where a series of bridges link to the old city and park.
negative_comment: Sadly, on the morning of my departure I had a problem with the fixture which converts from bath to shower waterflow. I had just take part in the local Graz parkrun so a shower would have been nice instead of climbing in and out of a bath with aching limbs. These things happen

positive_comment: The staff was absolutely wonderful and my only regret was that I didn't get to know their names so I could thank them personally.
negative_comment: The showers could use a renovation - bigger showers with new tile grout and silicone caulk, but everything else was great.

title: We loved our stay at the charming Hotel Mariahilf. The staff really enhanced our stay in Graz by how friendly and helpfu

negative_comment: The floors were a little bit creaky but we were happy to look past that as the building was built in the 1600’s!

positive_comment: Great hotel on great location. Very nice, quiet and clean rooms. Great breakfast. Staff is perfect! Great value for money. For sure I will back at this hotel again.

title: Good stay in Graz

negative_comment: Nothing particular. In room was no kettel and fridge, but it is not necessary. Maybe the wardrobe in my room was old, but I saw in others that was the new one for example.

title: Acceptable

title: A fine bit old fashioned cozy hotel close to the city center and the remarkable museum of contemporary art.

positive_comment: I Have frequently stayed at this hotel, very clean, good breakfast friendly staff great location.
negative_comment: Can be a little noisy at night depending on the room but does not stop us choosing this hotel.

title: Cozy place to stay near the city center
positive_comment:
The hotel is situated in the buzzing city center of Graz, close to public transportation, sights and a lovely farmer's market. The staff of the hotel were very welcoming from the first second, helping us getting around town and being very accomodating with any request that we had in our mind. There was even a welcome drink included with our stay, which we could get from the hotel's own bar. Breakfast was nice and plenty and was served in the hotel's own breakfast lounge.

There are several great restaurants nearby, and all the sights of Graz are in a walking distance. The hotel does not have its own private car park, however there is an underground parking where hotel guests can park with a discount and it is literally a minute away from the hotel in a convenient location.
negative_comment: The only thing that we would change was the bed. For us it was too soft, were not providing enough support for our backs, but that is a minor thing and is based on our own personal preference.

positive_comment: Very comfort and clean room, friendly staff, good location

title: Decent hotel with good location.
positive_comment: Nice hotel and spacious, clean rooms. Good location with short walk to center and some nice restaurants near by. Morning staff was very friendly. Breakfast was ok.
negative_comment: Bed is a bit too firm for my taste and pillows not very comfortable. Air conditioner made odd popping noises a few times overnight. Last day Sunday there was only staff until 15:00 which means leaving luggage beyond then was not possible. In my case that was ok but had I planned to stay longer this would have been an issue. Breakfast was ok but nothing spectacular.

title: Overall it was ok
positive_comment: The lady at the reception was very nice. The location suits us perfectly. We stayed there before. Although there were some construction works going on, it was quiet. But we would prefer if we would be informed about the construction works and no parking in front of the hotel prior to booking. The room itself was clean, we liked the sign on the wall. It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.

positive_comment:
Bright comfortable spacious room.
Nice area and short walk to city centre.
Staff helpful and pleasant and allowed us to store our bags on checkout. 
Graz is a great town, we hope to return. We would stay here again.
negative_comment: Liked everything

positive_comment:
Great location to explore Graz. 
Nearby parking available for 15eur if booked throught reception (otherwise 40eur per 24 hours!! )
Good breakfast.

title: Excellent value and very positive experience
positive_comment: Very well located, close to main attractions without being in the middle of the crowds. Staff was great and helpful. Looks like the rooms have been recently refurbished and everything looks fresh and pleasing. Breakfast was great. Would stay again for sure.
negative_comment: For the kind of value the hotel delivers I can't really pick anything.

positive_comment: Perfect location, great personnel, tasty breakfast. No dedicated hotel parking, but this issue was solved instantly by providing ticket to the nearest public garage.
negative_comment: Some may be surprised by the interesting interior decision (shower cabin and sink right in front of a bed) with no door between bathroom and bedroom zones. Not a problem for an individual traveller, but might be an inconvenience for some cases.

title: Excellent
positive_comment: Everything was great. The hotel is on the nice location in the center of Graz, the staff was friendly, rooms were modern,cosy and clean..parking garage is near the hotel (100m) and everything else is near..

title: The loveliest hotel in Graz
positive_comment: This is the most charming hotel. We felt like home. It is close to literally everything and there are a couple of great restaurants and cute shops around. The parking is right in front of the hotel. Breakfast is amazing. The staff is always smiling and nice. I can’t reccomend this hotel enough. We fell in love with Graz and when we come back,we’ll stay in this hotel. Thank you for everything.

title: Muy acogedor.
positive_comment:
Ubicación: muy céntrico, en el corazón de una zona con ambiente y a menos de 20m, a pie, de la Catedral y el Mausoleo.
Habitación: amplia, luminosa, impoluta y, lo mejor que puedo decir, 'acogedora'. Cuarto de ducha amplio y separado del wc, también amplio. Magnífico colchón. Tiene un pequeño minibar y el wifi se coge bien.
Desayuno: tipo buffet. Hay donde elegir. Todo lo que probe bueno.
Personal: profesional y muy atento.
Parking: abierto, enfrente de la entrada del hotel. No dispone de muchas plazas.
negative_comment: Por poner un 'pero', si hubiera tenido una hervidora en la habitación sería perfecto.

title: CORRECTO
positive_comment: Hotel situado fuera del centro histórico pero muy cercano a ello. En la calle del hotel hay mucha vida con restaurantes. El hotel y el desayuno cumplen.

title: Habitaciones modernas y muy confortables
positive_comment: El hotel y las habitaciones eran muy lindos y confortables. La decoración es muy moderna y la habitación y el baño son muy espaciosos y bien decorados. La atención del personal es muy buena. De hecho fueron muy amables ya que el estacionamiento del hotel era pago pero como estaba casi vacío no me cobraron la tarifa.
negative_comment: En realidad estoy muy conforme con todo. El único detalle es que la cama estaba formada por 2 camas individuales juntas, lo cual no es cómodo. Hubiera sido un buen gesto que dejaran una botellita de agua de cortesía.

title: Nuestra primera opción en Graz
positive_comment:
Hemos estado varias veces alojados en este hotel. Nuestra hija vive en Graz y vamos cuando podemos. La primera vez que nos alojamos ahí fue en 2017, pero después de esa fecha renovaron el hotel y superó con creces nuestras expectativas. Intentamos ir cada año y siempre es nuestra primera opción. Seguiremos alojándonos en este hotel siempre que esté disponible.
El personal es encantador y muy dispuesto a ayudar en lo que puedan. La entrada y salida, en caso de ser en horario fuera de recepción, se hace sin problema. 
Muchas gracias.
negative_comment: Nada. Todo perfecto.

positive_comment: Todo, cuando entras a un hotel y todo esta perfecto solo queda darles las gracias y la 🎊🎉Enhorabuena

positive_comment: Tout. L'accueil, les équipements de l'hôtel. Le confort de la literie et le calme.
negative_comment: Rien

positive_comment:
Lage in Zentrumnähe - sehr schöne Zimmer und auch alles sehr sauber. Kaffee aus Kaffeemaschine wurde im Foyer zur Verfügung gestellt. Dieser war auch sehr gut.
Sehr positiv habe ich empfunden, dass sich die Dame im Büro für die "Umstände" entschuldigt hat und extrem hilfsbereit war.
negative_comment: Online-Check in - dieser konnte nur dank einer sehr freundlichen Dame bewältigt werden (Tablett funktionierte nicht zu 100 %). Frühstück war in ein Partnerlokal ausgelagert und konnte nicht wie früher im Hotel konsumiert werden. Dies war uns vorher nicht bekannt. Beim Frühstück selbst, war das Personal zwar sehr freundlich - jedoch  überfordert. Angemerkt wird, dass das Lokal um 9:00 Uhr voll war. Semmeln waren aufgetaut und feucht und Wurst und Käse mussten immer wieder urgiert werden (sicher auch aufgrund der hohen Gästeanzahl geschuldet).

positive_comment:
Seit einer Woche ein Self Service Hotel. Personal ist sehr bemüht, den Check In zu begleiten
Tolle Lage am Lendplatz
Großes und sauberes Zimmer.
Frühstück im Partnerhotel (Steirer Stuben ... 100m) sehr gut.
negative_comment:
Snack- / Getränke- / Kaffeeautomaten noch nicht in Betrieb (stehen aber schon)
Parken sehr schwierig. In der nächsten öffentlichen Garage (400m) 22 Euro/ Tag.

title: Transitübernachtung im Herzen der Stadt, um in wenigen Stunden viel von der Stadt zu Fuß zu sehen
positive_comment: Komfortable, geräumige Unterkunft in perfekter Lage. Das Badezimmer ist riesig und bietet sowohl eine Badewanne als auch eine Dusche. Zwischen dem luxuriösen Waschbecken auf der einen Seite und der nahezu separaten Toilette (mit Schiebetür) auf der anderen Seite ist sehr viel Platz. Vielleicht das beste Badezimmer, das wir je in einem Hotel gesehen haben. Der Preis ist für diese Lage und diesen Komfort sehr angemessen.
negative_comment: Es gibt nicht genügend Parkplätze in der Nähe des Hotels, sodass man sein Auto in einer öffentlichen Garage abstellen muss, die nicht direkt neben dem Hotel liegt und einige enge Passagen aufweist. Der Preis pro Tag (für Hotelgäste) ist jedoch sehr akzeptabel. Das Frühstück erschien uns zu teuer, weshalb wir es im Hotel nicht eingenommen haben. Ohne diese beiden Unannehmlichkeiten hätte die Bewertung 10 betragen können.

title: Super, jederzeit wieder sehr zu empfehlen

negative_comment: Die Dusche hat einen Mega glatten Boden Achtung geboten

title: teure, aber saubere Unterkunft in guter Lage

positive_comment: Posizione centrale, hotel accogliente, camera pulita e grande
negative_comment: Colazione presa a parte 19 euro, prezzo alto per una colazione nella norma. Una stanza vicino ha tenuto la TV accesa tutta notte, un po' si sentiva.

positive_comment: Friendly and accommodating staff, great location right next to a ski lift, with a convenient ski room.

Struttura moderna, accogliente e in pieno centro di Graz ma camere estremamente silenziose.
Camere molto ampie e pulitissime con un letto grande e comodo.
I dintorni dell'hotel (zona semi pedonale) sono molto belli e tranquilli, anche la sera, con tanti locali.
Parcheggio pubblico a prezzo convenzionato nelle vicinanze.
negative_comment:
Le tende oscuranti non coprono la larghezza delle finestre e il mattino entra molta luce.
Colazione buona ma 19 euro a persona sono eccessivi.

positive_comment: Posizione centralissima,parcheggio in struttura,colazione abbondante sia salata che dolce, staff gentile e disponibile.

title: Una notte di passaggio per Vienna
positive_comment: Ottima posizione ed ottima stanza(avevamo prenotato una junior suite)
negative_comment: Peccato per la colazione per quanto riguarda la parte dolce! Avremmo mangiato volentieri un croissant ma non c'erano

title: Eccezionale rapporto qualità prezzo.
positive_comment: Camera impeccabile, pulitissima e spaziosissima con bagno in locale separato dal wc. Letto comodissimo e ottimo isolamento acustico. Colazione del tutto superiore alla media degli hotel di questa categoria. La posizione dell'albergo è ideale per visitare la città. Non essendo nel centro storico, ma adiacente allo stesso, dispone di posteggio auto ad un prezzo del tutto ragionevole. Il ristorante consigliato si è rivelato ottimo (cucina tipica) e con tariffe molto convenienti. Nei pressi c'è anche un mercato.
negative_comment: Nulla! Unico possibile suggerimento: aggiungere un bollitore nella stanza.

title: Week end a Graz
positive_comment: Hotel in centro storico, di recente ristrutturazione. Camere ampie e accoglienti. Personale disponibile e molto gentile. Parcheggio privato gratuito
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Consigliato!
positive_comment: La camera luminosa e molto spaziosa, ben arredata e con colori chiari. La posizione: il quartiere Lend è molto vivace, bei negozi e locali, praticamente in centro.
negative_comment: Nulla

title: Perfetto
positive_comment: Bella stanza, grande e confortevole. Posizione centralissima. Colazione ottima anche se poca scelta di pezzi dolci. Volendo c’è il parcheggio sotterraneo a 5 minuti a piedi a 15 euro al giorno con la tariffa dell’hotel.
negative_comment: Niente

title: Ottimo soggiorno a Graz
positive_comment: Le stanze pulite e confortevoli, personale gentile e disponibile, ottima colazione, la posizione vicinissima al centro,  il parcheggio di pertinenza della struttura.

positive_comment: Conduzione familiare, proprietari gentilissimi, genuini e super simpatici. Ottimo ristorante e generosa colazione.

title: Un ottimo hotel

La struttura non è nuova ma è ben tenuta e si trova in una zona tranquilla, con il centro città a pochi passi. La colazione a buffet è buona e la sera di può cenare al ristorante dell'hotel. Lo consiglio.

title: Excellent séjour dans cet hôtel très central et confortable

Pas de porte séparative pour la salle de bain, ce qui peut être gênant pour certains clients.

positive_comment: Hôtel bien situé près du centre ville. Possibilité de garer la voiture devant l'hôtel avec un supplément. Belle chambre spacieuse, très bonne literie. Petit déjeuner excellent. Personnel accueillant.

positive_comment: Localisation, confort de la chambre, amabilité du personnel

Les chambres très modernes n'ont rien à voir avec l 'accueil et l espace petit-déjeuner plutôt vieillot. La chambre était super spacieuse, idem pour la salle de bain et les toilettes séparées. Le tout dans un décor très design.
Le parking privé est petit mais pratique et seulement à 7 euros la journée. L'hôtel est idéalement situé pour visiter Graz. Le petit-déjeuner est très correct.

title: Decent hotel with good location.
positive_comment: Nice hotel and spacious, clean rooms. Good location with short walk to center and some nice restaurants near by. Morning staff was very friendly. Breakfast was ok.
negative_comment: Bed is a bit too firm for my taste and pillows not very comfortable. Air conditioner made odd popping noises a few times overnight. Last day Sunday there was only staff until 15:00 which means leaving luggage beyond then was not possible. In my case that was ok but had I planned to stay longer this would have been an issue. Breakfast was ok but nothing spectacular.

title: Overall it was ok
positive_comment: The lady at the reception was very nice. The location suits us perfectly. We stayed there before. Although there were some construction works going on, it was quiet. But we would prefer if we would be informed about the construction works and no parking in front of the hotel prior to booking. The room itself was clean, we liked the sign on the wall. It is a nice touch. Air condition worked perfectly. Beds are comfortable, showers are very spatious. There is also a back entrance to the bulding, we used it when going out. They prepare for self check in, I would miss the interaction in person.
negative_comment: In the breakfast room the coffee maschine was broken. Ok, we understand, it happens. But the milk was served in a glass jar and it cooled down, the coffee as well. Also they do not refill food. What is served, there is, and when it is finished, they do not refill it. For example, some sort kurbiskernen spread, cheese, salami, baked bacon.

positive_comment:

Graz is a great town, we hope to return. We would stay here again.

negative_comment: For the kind of value the hotel delivers I can't really pick anything.

title: Great location, superb staff
positive_comment:
First of all the location is great if you wanna go to the circuit, RedBull Ring. It’s super close and at the same time located between two train stations, near the bus stop, so even if you arrive without car you’ll be able to get around. The room was clean and bathroom nice and big. I slept well on the bed and had enough space in the room to even work out - which is always a plus. 
Loved the staff! From the moment I arrived to the second I left everyone was exceptionally kind and caring! Thank you for your help and effort to make my stay this good. It’s much appreciated! I will return for sure.

Auch gut: Matratze ok, gut geschlafen, Parkplatz direkt beim Hotel.

Das Hotel ist in einer sehr guten Lage.
Super freundlich.

Es zu 100% weiter zu empfehlen

title: Excellent and Amazing!
positive_comment:
I stayed at Hotel Sonnenalm in Semmering as a solo traveler for a 3-day snowboarding trip, and it exceeded all expectations.

The owner went above and beyond by personally driving me to Vienna for my connecting train and even giving me a small tour of the city along the way — an incredibly generous and thoughtful gesture.

The food was outstanding, both the breakfast and the meals from the hotel restaurant were excellent and very satisfying after long days of snowboarding.

The staff were all extremely friendly, welcoming, and helpful, which made the stay feel warm and personal despite traveling alone.

The location is very peaceful and relaxing, perfect for unwinding after time on the slopes. It’s an ideal base for snowboarding at Stuhleck.

I would 100% stay here again and highly recommend Hotel Sonnenalm to anyone visiting Semmering — especially solo travelers.
negative_comment: None

positive_comment:
We had an amazing time at this boutique hotel! From check-in to breakfast, everything exceeded our expectations. The highlight was enjoying dinner at the hotel one evening - the food was delicious! 🍽️ Highly recommend this gem!

Very comfortable, everyone loves it! 

Price for dinner was reasonable. 3 main course, a soup, a dessert, a coke and 2 large beers at €100.

We have president appartment with breakfast. The hotel is next to the ski lift. There is small heated swimming pool just enough for relax. Staff was very kind and heplful. Comfortable beds. Good breakfast.
negative_comment: Less place for legs on the toilet in this appartement.

title: Memorable
positive_comment: Ski in/ Ski out. Walking distance to ski lifts. Sauna and food was excellent. Nice menu options available for dinner. Breakfast was pleasant.
negative_comment: Hot tub hard to fill

positive_comment:
The hotel is located directly next to anchor ski lift, you can walk out in your ski boots. 
Everything in hotel was new and very clean. Breakfast was fine, not amazing/not bad. They have a very good coffee machine and a good coffee. Staff very nice, friendly a helpful.
negative_comment: More wardrobes and shelfs whare to put our stuff in room and bathroom would help. Spa area very tiny - only one small finish sauna and one jacuzzi bath (not the big spa one, but smaller one like some people have at home).

positive_comment: The staff was very helpful and help us in any request. We had breakfast and dinner ,wich were very delicious. The hotel is very intimate and wonderful

El personal es muy amable. La ubicación es excelente para esquiar. El desayuno bueno y variado. Ha sido una estancia muy agradable.

title: Ideal para familias.
positive_comment: El check in es a las 3 p.m..  Nos dejaron la habitación desde nuestra llegada a las 111am. Veníamos con bebé y mascota. Estuvimos  muy agradecidas.

title: Comy cosy inviting friendly super clean super fresh food
positive_comment: Absolutely everything amazing will definitely come back
negative_comment: Can not fault this property or the people looking after it so lovely

title: Excellent and Amazing!
positive_comment:
I stayed at Hotel Sonnenalm in Semmering as a solo traveler for a 3-day snowboarding trip, and it exceeded all expectations.

The owner went above and beyond by personally driving me to Vienna for my connecting train and even giving me a small tour of the city along the way — an incredibly generous and thoughtful gesture.

The food was outstanding, both the breakfast and the meals from the hotel restaurant were excellent and very satisfying after long days of snowboarding.

The staff were all extremely friendly, welcoming, and helpful, which made the stay feel warm and personal despite traveling alone.

The location is very peaceful and relaxing, perfect for unwinding after time on the slopes. It’s an ideal base for snowboarding at Stuhleck.

I would 100% stay here again and highly recommend Hotel Sonnenalm to anyone visiting Semmering — especially solo travelers.
negative_comment: None

positive_comment:
We had an amazing time at this boutique hotel! From check-in to breakfast, everything exceeded our expectations. The highlight was enjoying dinner at the hotel one evening - the food was delicious! 🍽️ Highly recommend this gem!

Very comfortable, everyone loves it! 

Price for dinner was reasonable. 3 main course, a soup, a dessert, a coke and 2 large beers at €100.

We have president appartment with breakfast. The hotel is next to the ski lift. There is small heated swimming pool just enough for relax. Staff was very kind and heplful. Comfortable beds. Good breakfast.
negative_comment: Less place for legs on the toilet in this appartement.

title: Memorable
positive_comment: Ski in/ Ski out. Walking distance to ski lifts. Sauna and food was excellent. Nice menu options available for dinner. Breakfast was pleasant.
negative_comment: Hot tub hard to fill

positive_comment:
The hotel is located directly next to anchor ski lift, you can walk out in your ski boots. 
Everything in hotel was new and very clean. Breakfast was fine, not amazing/not bad. They have a very good coffee machine and a good coffee. Staff very nice, friendly a helpful.
negative_comment: More wardrobes and shelfs whare to put our stuff in room and bathroom would help. Spa area very tiny - only one small finish sauna and one jacuzzi bath (not the big spa one, but smaller one like some people have at home).

positive_comment: The staff was very helpful and help us in any request. We had breakfast and dinner ,wich were very delicious. The hotel is very intimate and wonderful

title: Funktionell, sauber und gut geeignet um zu übernachten.
positive_comment:
Das Hotel ist einfach, sauber und gut geeignet um zu übernachten. Das Bad ist funktionell und geräumig, das Frühstück entspricht dieser Kategorie von Hotel und war in Ordnung, alles vorhanden was ich erwartet habe. Das Hotel arbeitet mit Zugangscode, bei Fragen wie z.B. einer UPS Lieferung war jederzeit jemand erreichbar, UPS wurde verlässlich übernommen. 
Auch gut: Matratze ok, gut geschlafen, Parkplatz direkt beim Hotel.

Das Hotel ist in einer sehr guten Lage.
Super freundlich.
Sehr gutes Frühstück.
Sehr gepflegt und sauber.
Mit sehr vielen Pkw Parkplätze
Es zu 100% weiter zu empfehlen

Alles sauber, tolle Sauna, gute Speisen, gute Preisen.
negative_comment: Im Zimmer war die Matraze veraltet und sehr weich.

title: Wunderschönes Hotel mit Lift direkt neben dem Haus!
positive_comment: Schlepplift genau vor der Haustüre Skiverleih im Haus Gastraum/Rezeption mit täglichen Frühstück und Abendessen Zimmer neu und modern eingerichtet
negative_comment: Kleines Doppelzimmer man musste über das Bett steigen um ins WC zu gelangen da das Doppelbett so breit wie das Zimmer war.

positive_comment: Sehr ruhige Umgebung, Zimmer und Badezimmer sehr grosszügig
negative_comment:
Dass das Restaurant geschlossen war.

title: Waren nur für eine Nacht, empfehlenswert.
positive_comment:
Zimmer war individuell, einzigartig mit der Ausstattung der Einrichtung.
Unkomplizierte Ankunft.
negative_comment: Keine Hacken für die Badetücher.

positive_comment: Freundlichkeit, schön renoviertes Zimmer. Sehr gutes Frühstück.
negative_comment: Das Zimmer war so klein und es gab ausser 3 Wandhaken keinen Schrank oder ein Regal, sodass ich meine Tasche nicht auspacken konnte.

title: tolles Hotel direkt an der Piste
positive_comment:
direkt neben der Piste,
freundliches Personal,
gratis Ladestationen für E-Autos

Sehr sauberes, jedoch etwas kleines Zimmer, besonders das Bad. Sehr freundliches Personal! Waren über Silvester da und haben ein fünf Gänge Menü konsumiert dass seinen Preis hatte, jedoch ausgezeichnet war! Das Frühstück war auch sehr gut und umfangreich! Leider hatte das Restaurant am Montag Ruhetag und wir mussten ins Dorfzentrum Abendessen gehen, wo es nur zwei Gasthäuser gibt. Sehr zu empfehlen mit super freundlichen Mitarbeitern und einer sehr netten Chefin!
negative_comment:
Badezimmer etwas zu eng
Matratze für uns zu weich

title: Freundlich, sauber, Pool, Sonne, kalte Getränke. Mehr braucht man nicht.
positive_comment:
Das Hotelpersonal war extrem freundlich, ehrlich und aufmerksam. Das Pool war eingelassen. Die Outdoormöbel neu und top. Die Zimmer wurden täglich gereinigt (wäre nicht nötig gewesen, da wir am Festival waren und nur 3 Nächte gebucht haben) Die Getränke waren kalt, alles war sehr sauber. Was will man mehr?
Das Hotel ist auch für einen Wanderurlaub oder Kurzurlaub am Pool sehr zu empfehlen.
negative_comment: Da wir am Kaltenbach Open Air waren, wären einfache, preisgünstigere Speisen/Snacks passend gewesen (Suppen, heiße Würstel, Pizza, Toast) War aber nicht schlimm, die angebotenen Speisen waren gut, wenn auch teuer. Aber wir haben immer kostenlos Chips bekommen. Der Zimmerpreis war für ein Festival gerade noch OK, teurer sollte es jedoch nicht mehr werden.

title: Gemütliches und geschmackvoll eingerichtetes Hotel
positive_comment: Ein sehr geschmackvoll eingerichtetes kleines Hotel mit sehr freundlichem Service. Die Betten sind sehr gemütlich, die Einrichtung geschmackvoll, hochwertig und neu . Wir waren mit Kindern unterwegs und hatten einige Extrawünsche beim Essen, die uns alle erfüllt wurden. Schönes Frühstück. Wir kommen gerne wieder :)
negative_comment: Schön wäre ein Föhn und Schminkspiegel im Bad.

title: Un ottimo albergo
positive_comment: L'albergo è in una posizione ottima, a due passi dall'aeroporto Zeltweg. La struttura è nuova e ho trovato la camera davvero pulita e confortevole. Molto buona anche la colazione a buffet.
negative_comment: Andava tutto bene.

title: Gradevole e rilassante, molto comodo ai servizi.
positive_comment: Colazione ottima, posto molto tranquillo e silenzioso, comodissimo al centro città e al Red bull ring.
negative_comment: Toglierei la moquette nelle camere.

title: Exceeded expectations
positive_comment: A really comfortable hotel with really kind , friendly staff. The hotel was immaculately clean . The bathroom was spotless and had a generous amount of towels. I slept really well . The breakfast was really good - something for everyone and again presented beautifully. All staff I met were friendly and helpful. Supermarket 2 mins drive away or easy 20 min walk.
negative_comment: Nothing.

title: Great location, superb staff
positive_comment:
First of all the location is great if you wanna go to the circuit, RedBull Ring. It’s super close and at the same time located between two train stations, near the bus stop, so even if you arrive without car you’ll be able to get around. The room was clean and bathroom nice and big. I slept well on the bed and had enough space in the room to even work out - which is always a plus. 
Loved the staff! From the moment I arrived to the second I left everyone was exceptionally kind and caring! Thank you for your help and effort to make my stay this good. It’s much appreciated! I will return for sure.

title: Gutes Hotel in Bahnhofnähe
positive_comment: Das Hotel liegt fußläufig vom Bahnhof und ist gut und sauber ausgestattet. Das Auto kann man auf der Strasse vor dem Hotel parken, muss aber Parkgebühr zahlen.
Gutes Hotel für Durchreisende - unkompliziertes, sehr freundliches und hilfsbereites Personal.

title: Jederzeit gerne wieder!
positive_comment: Schönes modernes Hotel, sehr sauber, jederzeit wieder!

title: Perfekt für einen Städtetrip
positive_comment: Sehr zentrale Lage, sehr freundliches Personal, Zimmer sehr sauber, bequeme Betten

negative_comment: Die Zimmer waren trotz Klima sehr warm

title: Schönes Hotel bei Zuganreise, Ruhig direkt am Bahnhof
positive_comment:
Alles bestens bei Anreise mit dem Zug! Perfekte Lage, Ruhig trotz Bahnhof!
Modern und sauber eingerichtet

Wir waren vor Kurzem in Graz und haben in diesem Hotel übernachtet – und waren sehr zufrieden.

Die Lage direkt neben dem Bahnhof ist sehr praktisch und angenehm. Unser Zimmer war wirklich sehr schön, sauber und gepflegt.

Obwohl wir spät in der Nacht angekommen sind, wurden wir herzlich empfangen. An der Rezeption waren eine junge Dame und ein junger Mann, die wirklich sehr freundlich, hilfsbereit und äußerst nett waren und uns sofort ein angenehmes Gefühl gegeben haben.

Besonders möchten wir uns bei der Mitarbeiterin Amina bedanken. Sie hat uns während unseres Aufenthalts betreut und war außergewöhnlich höflich, freundlich und aufmerksam. Ihr Service war wirklich hervorragend.

Auch das Essen im Hotel war sehr gut.

Wir haben uns rundum wohlgefühlt und werden bei unserem nächsten Aufenthalt in Graz auf jeden Fall wieder dieses Hotel wählen.

Vielen Dank an das gesamte Team!

negative_comment: Il parcheggio privato abbastanza costoso ma in Austria i parcheggi sono un incubo anche nelle strade generalmente

positive_comment: Bella la posizione vicino alla stazione ferroviaria e non lontano dal centro città che si raggiunge a piedi comodamente in 10 minuti. La camera insonorizzata bene molto confortevole dai letti comodi alla poltrona rilassante è dotata anche di bollitore. L'albergo è dotato di parcheggio sotterraneo ma noi non abbiamo usufruito del servizio in quanto abbiamo trovato posto nella via dell' hotel. Colazione con ottima scelta. Torneremo sicuramente ci siamo trovati benissimo.
negative_comment: Nulla da segnalare

positive_comment:
Comodissimo alla stazione (per noi viaggiatori ferroviari), praticamente di lato al 1° binario e a due passi dalla fermata del tram per il centro. Camera molto bella, ben fornita e accessoriata, personale cortesissimo e disponibile (peccato nessuno parli italiano!), colazione ben fornita e molto variegata.
Da ritornarci!

La privacy del bagno  è approssimativa, infatti un vetro, seppur smerigliato, divide la doccia dalla camera.

positive_comment: Nice rooms. Good breakfast. Next to the train station, but walking distance to the centre. Nice and helpful staff.
negative_comment: It was a bit hot in the room. The thermostat doesn’t really do much. But I stayed for one night only so I didn’ bother to complain.

title: The staff was very friendly, the room was enormous :), the distance to the city center not so long.
positive_comment: We arrived a bit before 1pm and did the check in with no issues.

title: Exceptional😊
positive_comment: Clean, helpful staff, the lady at the reception was exceptionally kind and professional, she even spoke our language, hungarian.
negative_comment: At first we did not know how to turn off the fan in the bathroom, we only managed to do it during the night when we could not sleep already for few hours, some direction on how to use it would have been nice, but this is a minor thing, we loved and enjoyed our stay

positive_comment: Comfortable hotel near Railway station. Good parking, that is a problem in city center. IC. Is dood brand!

title: Great location, decent service, reasonable price
positive_comment:
Staff was super helpful and welcoming.
Breakfast is great and abundant.
Clean and spacious rooms.
negative_comment:
Electric lock didn't work so we got another room. It wasn't a big deal, but it was inconvenient.
Maintenance personell decided to do repairs in the neighboring room during afternoon hours after lunch. They were noisy and at one point they entered my room without knocking or checking if anyone is inside.

title: Perfect to discover the city
positive_comment: Big room, next to the railway, but no noise thanks to the quality windows. Nice breakfast

Great location, next to tram tram station,
Hotel looks modern,
Perfect for 1 night
A lot of available parking space 20 euro/day
Breakfast is okay, not bad but very simple.
negative_comment:
Can't say room was really clean,
Shower wasn't draining. Staff has fixed it quickly and changed towels.
